Blackberry near reservoir, small, rounded leafed variety. Sweet and plump since they get enough water. There is a large alligator in the pond (so don't go swimming lol). Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-June.
109 Town Hall Dr, Leland, NC 28451, USA
